get.description: Liveness: process is up. Dependency-light (no DB) on purpose.

Readiness: checks the DB so orchestration can gate traffic without
coupling liveness to it. 200 when ready, 503 when degraded.

parameters.name: metric

schema.description: e.g. steps | stress | spo2 | heart_rate | energy_expenditure
schema.title: Metric

parameters.description: e.g. steps | stress | spo2 | heart_rate | energy_expenditure

schema.title: Response List Points Api V1 Telemetry Get
Response Daily Rollup Api V1 Telemetry Daily Get

get.description: Per-night sleep summaries (total + stages) for the sleep trend.

schema.title: Response Sleep Series Api V1 Telemetry Sleep Get

get.description: Smart-scale series (weight, body fat %, skeletal muscle, BMR) for trends.

schema.title: Response Body Composition Api V1 Body Composition Get
Response List Training Api V1 Training Get

patch.description: Edit session fields; `load` recomputes from duration×rpe when unset explicitly.

post.description: Log sets against a session; free-text exercise names resolve to the catalog.

patch.description: Edit one set; returns the updated session.

delete.description: Remove one set; returns the updated session.

schema.title: Response Search Exercises Api V1 Exercises Get

patch.description: Edit a catalog exercise. Renaming regenerates the slug (409 on collision).

delete.description:
Delete a catalog exercise. Soft-deletes (deactivates) instead when logged sets
still reference it, so history stays intact. Returns the action taken.

schema.title: Response Delete Exercise Api V1 Exercises  Exercise Id  Delete

post.description: Manual meal entry. Items with grams but no macros are resolved via nutrition_core.

Photo meal entry: proxied to image-svc. If the GPU box is unreachable the
response is a degraded empty manual meal (never a 5xx).

patch.description: Edit a meal's name and/or timestamp (fix a wrong entry).

post.description:
Add items to a meal by catalog food (portion×qty or grams), free-text food +
grams, or a raw kcal-only quick entry.

patch.description:
Edit a single item; returns the updated meal. Macros re-estimate when grams
change and aren't pinned explicitly.

delete.description: Remove one item; returns the updated meal.

schema.title: Response Search Foods Api V1 Foods Get
Response Recent Foods Api V1 Foods Recent Get

parameters.name: name

schema.description: Typed food name to resolve via the matcher.
schema.title: Name

parameters.description: Typed food name to resolve via the matcher.

get.description: Today's recommendations. Generated + stored lazily on first request for a day.

post.description: Force a regenerate + store (the daily-pass trigger).

schema.title: Response List Goals Api V1 Goals Get

post.description:
Create a goal. Unspecified fields are filled from the goal type (category,
metric, surplus/deficit, protein target, baseline from latest body comp).

get.description: The current active goal(s) (at most one body + one sleep) with live progress.

schema.title: Response Active Goals Api V1 Goals Active Get

patch.description: Edit a goal or change its status (active|achieved|abandoned).

get.description:
One call powering the frontend home: telemetry summary + training + nutrition
totals + recommendations for the day.

post.description:
Import complementary telemetry from a Samsung Health export.

Routes each file by its metadata line-1 data type; unknown types are reported
as skipped, not errors. Upload the sleep_stage file alongside sleep to enrich
deep/awake stage minutes. Idempotent: re-uploading the same export is safe.

files.title: Files
files.description: One or more Samsung Health export CSVs.

DailyRollup.title: DailyRollup
DailyRollup.description:
One day's rollup for a metric. `sum` is meaningful for additive metrics
(steps, energy_expenditure); `avg`/`min`/`max` for the rest.

ExerciseUpdate.title: ExerciseUpdate
ExerciseUpdate.description:
Partial catalog edit (PATCH). When `name` changes the slug is regenerated
(409 on collision). Supplying `muscles` replaces the muscle set wholesale.

calorie_delta.title: Calorie Delta
calorie_delta.description: Surplus(+)/deficit(-) kcal vs TDEE to aim for.

GoalIn.title: GoalIn
GoalIn.description:
Create a goal. Most fields are optional — only `type` is required; the
service fills sensible defaults (category, metric, baseline, nutrition knobs)
from the type and current body composition.

projected_date.title: Projected Date
projected_date.description: Date the current trend reaches the target.

GoalProgressOut.title: GoalProgressOut
GoalProgressOut.description: Computed progress for a goal: the fitted trend over its metric vs target.

GoalUpdate.title: GoalUpdate
GoalUpdate.description: Patch an existing goal. `status` flips a goal to achieved/abandoned.

ts.title: Ts
ts.description: When the meal was eaten (UTC ISO; naive assumed UTC).

MealItemAddIn.title: MealItemAddIn
MealItemAddIn.description:
Add an item by catalog food (food_id) with a portion×qty or grams, by
free-text food + grams (matcher-resolved), or a raw kcal-only quick entry.

food.title: Food
food.description: Food name; resolved against nutrition_core when macros omitted.

MealItemUpdate.title: MealItemUpdate
MealItemUpdate.description:
Partial item edit. Omitted fields are left untouched. When `grams` changes
and macros aren't supplied, macros are re-estimated from the catalog/matcher.

ts.title: Ts
ts.description: When the meal was eaten (UTC ISO; naive assumed UTC).

MealUpdate.title: MealUpdate
MealUpdate.description: Partial meal edit. Only supplied fields are changed (PATCH semantics).

SleepNight.title: SleepNight
SleepNight.description: A night's sleep summary tagged with the calendar day it ended on (for trends).

ts.title: Ts
ts.description: Session start (UTC ISO; naive is assumed UTC).

load.title: Load
load.description: Optional; auto-computed as duration_min × rpe when omitted.

TrainingSessionUpdate.title: TrainingSessionUpdate
TrainingSessionUpdate.description:
Partial session edit (PATCH). `load` recomputes from duration×rpe when those
change and no explicit load is given.

TrainingSetUpdate.title: TrainingSetUpdate
TrainingSetUpdate.description: Partial set edit. Omitted fields are untouched.
